player.description: Dark necromancer wizard top-down view, tattered black robes with glowing purple runes, skull staff, ethereal purple flame aura

enemy.description: Skeleton warrior enemy top-down view, dark bone armor with red glowing eyes, jagged bone sword, undead monster

boss.description: Massive demon lord boss top-down view, hulking dark red demonic body with black horns, molten lava veins, massive claws

soulgem.description: Glowing soul gem collectible, ethereal purple crystal diamond with swirling ghostly energy inside

crystal.description: Dark mana crystal collectible power-up, deep blue-purple hexagonal crystal with arcane energy wisps

token.description: Shadow Dungeon Token SDT coin icon for CrossRamp

playerBullet.description: Purple arcane magic bolt projectile, vertical elongated energy beam with swirling purple-violet magical particles

enemyBullet.description: Red demonic fireball projectile, glowing crimson-orange fire orb with dark smoke trail and ember particles

dungeon.description: Dark dungeon stone corridor background for vertical scrolling, ancient stone walls with green moss, torchlit floor tiles
